form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.CV.filter.form

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CV.oi_cv, CV.c_nro_doc, CV.d_ape_y_nom, SEC.policy FROM SDP01_CV as CV, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.CV\') AS SEC JOIN CV.oi_cv LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE CV.oi_cv={#SOURCE:@id} ORDER BY d_ape_y_nom ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT CV.oi_cv, CV.c_nro_doc, CV.d_ape_y_nom, SEC.policy FROM SDP01_CV as CV, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.CV\') AS SEC JOIN CV.oi_cv LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE 1=1 {%?('##nombre##'!='') {% and contain(UCASE(CV.d_ape_y_nom), UCASE(\'##nombre##\')) %} {% %} %} {%?('##documento##'!='') {% and contain(CV.c_nro_doc, \'##documento##\') %} {% %} %} {%?('##sexo##'!='') {% and CV.c_sexo =\'##sexo##\' %} {% %} %}
ORDER BY d_ape_y_nom ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CV.oi_cv, CV.c_nro_doc, CV.d_ape_y_nom, SEC.policy FROM SDP01_CV as CV, {%?('##oi_area_exp##'!='' OR '##d_empresaExp##'!='') {% SDP01_EXPERIENCIA AS EXP, %} {% %} %} NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.CV\') AS SEC JOIN CV.oi_cv LEFT OUTER SEC.id {%?('##oi_area_exp##'!='' OR '##d_empresaExp##'!='') {% , CV.oi_cv INNER EXP.oi_cv %} {% %} %} WHERE 1=1 {%?('##oi_area_exp##'!='') {% and EXP.oi_area_exp = ##oi_area_exp## %} {% %} %} {%?('##d_empresaExp##'!='') {% and contain(UCASE(EXP.d_empresa), UCASE(\'##d_empresaExp##\')) %} {% %} %} GROUP BY CV.oi_cv, CV.c_nro_doc, CV.d_ape_y_nom, SEC.policy ORDER BY d_ape_y_nom ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
